children.text: Developing and examining techniques to measure concentrations of silicone in body fluids and tissues.
Surveillance of recipients of silicone breast implants, including long-term outcomes and local complications.

children.heading: Definition
children.label: b Definition
children.text: For purposes of this section, the term “breast implant” means a breast prosthesis that is implanted to augment or reconstruct the female breast.
